product_results.title: Spigen AluminaCore Tempered Glass Screen Protector [Glas.tR EZ Fit] designed for iPhone 17 Pro | iPhone 17 | iPhone 16 Pro [2 Pack] 9H+ Hardness, Aluminum-Enhanced Durability

summary.text: Customers find this screen protector to be a really good product that fits flawlessly and aligns perfectly. The installation process is amazingly easy, and users report absolutely no bubbles during application. The screen protector provides good functionality and screen protection, though customers have different opinions on its durability.

authors_reviews.title: Qualité Spigen, installation parfaite
authors_reviews.text: Excellent produit. L’installation est très facile grâce au guide fourni, sans bulles. La protection est solide, bien ajustée et n’affecte pas la sensibilité tactile ni la qualité de l’écran.On sent tout de suite la qualité Spigen. Le fait d’avoir deux protections dans le lot est un gros plus. Très bon rapport qualité-prix, je recommande sans hésiter
authors_reviews.author: lassoued

authors_reviews.title: Screen protector for iPhone
authors_reviews.text: Worked great, easy to install, no bubbles
authors_reviews.author: James Herle

authors_reviews.title: Converted me
authors_reviews.text: I’ve been firmly in the “no screen protector” camp for over a decade because I’ve hated the ones I used in the past, but I finally gave in and tried one again, and now this Spigen one has converted me—it’s fantastic. It was a dream to install: super easy and straightforward with the plastic shell/guide, and it aligned perfectly, with only a bit of fiddling needed to get out a couple of tiny air bubbles (which then totally disappeared!). The size is perfect for use with case (I’m using a Casetify Impact case); one minor con is that the tiniest bit of lint does collect along the edges (in between where the protector ends and the edge of the case begins), but it’s negligible, and that tiny bit of spacing really does seem necessary so that your case fits properly without shifting or pulling up the edges of the protector. Overall, I’m really pleased with it in the two weeks I’ve had it on my phone, as it’s been seamless to the eyes and touch. Not sure yet how it will hold up in terms of protection, but I’m hopeful!
authors_reviews.author: Erin

authors_reviews.title: Good quality, thin, forgiving application and good fit
authors_reviews.text: I've been using and liking the TPU / hydrogel style screen protectors for a few years and loving how thin they are. The store that had a machine to apply them no longer does this and tempered glass is much stronger and more protective, so I did a lot of research and landed on this product.I was hesitant to get tempered glass because of the bulk / thickness but it's not noticeable at all (and I like a really slim phone). I love the glide and fingerprints are a non-issue. I thought I would prefer a matte finish (if only it didn't reduce colour accuracy), but like this a lot more than I thought I would. It looks much better / higher end than the TPU protectors and doesn't show dents or scratches (even the self-repairing TPU shows wear and tear over time).I rarely write reviews but was really impressed with installation. Instructions are easy-to-follow and I like that everything you need is included, including a guide for accurate placement. A piece of dust got trapped and I removed the protector figuring I'd try to fix it but probably end up needing to use the 2nd in the package. I removed the dust easily with the sticker and replaced the protector with no reduced quality. Unfortunately, I placed it wrong since I couldn't use the guide. I removed it again and even still, it held up for a 3rd application.It has two small faults: the edge of the protector has a rainbow glare in certain angles (maybe this is an issue with all tempered glass protectors?) and occasionally my finger isn't recognized when tapping or stroking. This is in normal use (normal temperature, no gloves, etc).
authors_reviews.author: Shannon

authors_reviews.title: Feels Like There’s Nothing There — And Actually Protects
authors_reviews.text: I went through a phase of not using screen protectors because I didn’t like how most of them felt. They changed the touch sensitivity, felt thick, and just didn’t feel like the actual phone screen.Big mistake.I ended up paying to replace more than one cracked screen, which is not cheap. After that, I gave these a try, and I won’t go back.These feel just like the original phone screen. Super low profile, smooth to the touch, and the phone responds perfectly, like there’s nothing on it. That was the biggest win for me.The installation hardware that comes in the box is also excellent. It makes putting it on incredibly easy and ensures perfect positioning every time. No guessing, no frustrating misalignment.They’ve definitely saved my screen more than once.These are the only screen protectors I buy now. Great protection without sacrificing the feel of the phone.
authors_reviews.author: Chris McNaughton

authors_reviews.title: This makes sure you have no bubbles or trapped dust
authors_reviews.text: Good quality,easy to apply.It's my go to.
authors_reviews.author: Aldu

authors_reviews.title: Quality and Protective
authors_reviews.text: Spigen has been around a long time and they have always made quality products. These screen protectors are in a 3 pack and great value. The supplied easy install tray made it a breeze to install. I haven't needed the other 2 yet but is good to have spares in case I am clumsy and drop my phone.
authors_reviews.author: RocknRob

authors_reviews.title: My go-to phone cover for years
authors_reviews.text: The best phone protection cover I tried so far. Replacement is a breeze. I drop my phone twice hard enough for the cover to break and the phone never took a hit thanks to it.
authors_reviews.author: Antoine Desrochers
